title: OpenClaw Client
description: Connects to an OpenClaw gateway and exposes its tools for agent tool-calling.
Optionally bridges messaging channels (WhatsApp, Telegram, Slack, etc.) into pipelines.

openclaw_client.gatewayUrl.title: Gateway WebSocket URL
openclaw_client.gatewayUrl.description: OpenClaw gateway WebSocket address. Example: ws://127.0.0.1:18789

openclaw_client.httpUrl.title: Gateway HTTP URL
openclaw_client.httpUrl.description: OpenClaw gateway HTTP address for tool invocation. Example: http://127.0.0.1:18789

openclaw_client.groupWeb.title: Web (web_search only — web_fetch denied by default to avoid overlap with Firecrawl)

openclaw_client.groupFs.title: File System — blocked by gateway HTTP deny list by default
openclaw_client.groupFs.description: Tools: read, write, edit, apply_patch. NOTE: These are blocked by OpenClaw's gateway HTTP deny list by default. Requires gateway config change to enable.

openclaw_client.groupRuntime.title: Runtime — blocked by gateway HTTP deny list by default
openclaw_client.groupRuntime.description: Tools: exec, process. NOTE: These are blocked by OpenClaw's gateway HTTP deny list by default. Requires gateway config change to enable.

openclaw_client.toolDenyList.title: Tool Deny List
openclaw_client.toolDenyList.description: Comma-separated tool names to exclude. Defaults exclude tools that overlap with built-in RocketRide nodes (Firecrawl web scraping, file I/O). Remove entries to re-enable.

openclaw_client.enableMessageBridge.title: Enable Message Bridge
openclaw_client.enableMessageBridge.description: Listen for incoming messages from OpenClaw channels and feed them into the pipeline

openclaw_client.sessionKey.title: Session Key
openclaw_client.sessionKey.description: OpenClaw session to monitor for incoming messages

openclaw_client.channelFilter.title: Channel Filter
openclaw_client.channelFilter.description: Only bridge messages from these channels (comma-separated, empty = all). Example: whatsapp,telegram
